title: ModerationCase
description: A unified moderation work item covering verification, report, appeal, fraud, ATO, or safety case types.

subject_id.description: UUID of the user whose account is the subject of this case

reporter_id.description: UUID of the user who filed the report. Null for system-generated cases (fraud/ATO).

priority.description: P0 = 1h SLA (critical), P1 = 24h, P2 = 72h, P3 = best effort

assigned_to.description: UUID of the moderator currently assigned to this case. Null if unassigned.

sla_due_at.description: ISO-8601 deadline by which the case must have first moderator action

resolution_code.description: Outcome code set when the case is resolved or closed. Null while open/in-progress.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the case was created

resolved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the case was resolved or closed. Null while active.
